vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

generated_parts.label: Center Body Pod
generated_parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

verify.value: All required fields are present and valid.
verify.rule: All required fields must be present and valid.

verify.value: Estimated mass is 500g, within budget.
verify.rule: Estimated mass must be within budget.

verify.value: All required features (motor_mount, bolt_circle, cooling_inlet, pusher_prop, motor_pod) are present in geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required feature must be explicitly represented in geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces with adjacent modules are bidirectionally defined.
verify.rule: Each interface must be bidirectionally defined with exact neighboring subsystem labels, connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking and preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking and preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential access blockage for equipment bay door.
risk.mit: Ensure clear access paths and inspection windows are included.

risk.desc: Weak interface between pod_shell and wing_spar_reinforcement.
risk.mit: Increase reinforcement or use stronger fasteners.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect cooling_inlet performance.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal testing to validate cooling effectiveness.

risk.desc: Risk of tolerance mismatch between adjacent modules.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerances as needed during assembly.

risk.desc: Insufficient evidence for fastener joint sanity.
risk.mit: Ensure all fastener patterns are explicitly represented.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.description: Cooling air flow from motor pod to cooling inlet
Opening and closing of equipment bay door
Load transfer from wing spar to pod shell

integration_opportunities.description: Main body of the center pod, integrates all internal features.
Reinforces the pod where it connects to the wing spar.
Mounts the motor pylon to the rear of the pod.
Provides cooling air flow to the motor pod.
Allows access to the equipment bay.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection for fit and finish

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Continuous load path from wing skin to fuselage frames
Thermal dissipation from spar socket to wing skin
Kinetic energy transfer from wing tip to fuselage frames
Electrical continuity from harness to sensor pocket
CG battery service with slide rail and independent removal
Thermal dissipation of at least 100 Watts

verify.value: All required evidence_features appear in part_tree/geometry_ops
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must be present

verify.value: 1500 grams
verify.rule: Subsystem mass must not exceed 1500 grams

verify.value: All features are traceable back to design brief
verify.rule: Each feature must have a clear link to the design brief

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems
verify.rule: Each interface must have a matching joint family in the neighboring subsystem

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to CFRP material
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as cooling channels or heat sinks

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under extreme loads
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce critical load paths

risk.desc: Possibility of electrical interference from sensor pocket
risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and grounding of electrical components

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and use alignment tools

risk.desc: Potential for water ingress through service access
risk.mit: Implement sealing mechanisms and conduct water resistance tests

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Distributed lift loads from wing skin transferred to main spar via ribs
Heat dissipation from spar socket to anti-rotation key, then to wing skin
Kinetic energy from wing tip transferred to fuselage frames via carry-through
Electricity from harness to sensor pocket via harness passthrough

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure continuous load path from main spar to fuselage frames via carry-through
Optimize thermal path from spar socket to anti-rotation key via rib
Ensure electrical continuity from harness to sensor pocket via harness passthrough

manufacturing_strategy.datum: primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: non-destructive testing (NDT) via X-ray and ultrasonic
manufacturing_strategy.implications: Support structure must be removed post-manufacture, and all features must remain visible and inspectable

verification_focus.description: Ensure subsystem mass does not exceed 1500 grams
Verify all critical interfaces have clearance of at least 0.2mm
Confirm subsystem can handle a minimum load capacity of 5000 Newtons
Ensure subsystem can dissipate at least 100 Watts of thermal energy
Verify subsystem electrical resistance does not exceed 0.1 Ohm

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
generated_parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

verify.rule: mass budget

verify.value: all P0 internal_feature_targets appear in part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets
verify.rule: schema completeness

verify.value: geometry_ops include args.at coordinates distributed across the local subsystem volume
verify.rule: coordinate distribution

verify.value: uses drill, pocket, boss, channel, cylinder, chamfer, fillet, pattern, and engrave where appropriate
verify.rule: non-box feature variety

verify.value: motion claims are grounded in a named mechanism type with its pivot/axis geometry present
verify.rule: mechanism named not implied

verify.value: spar socket, anti-rotation keys, and center datum remain visible and inspectable
verify.rule: spar datum access

verify.value: payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only with removable mission/sensor module
verify.rule: mission payload non-weapon boundary

verify.value: battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal
verify.rule: cg battery service

verify.value: lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure: spar to carry-through to fuselage frames, with fittings at every load transfer
verify.rule: load path continuity

verify.value: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back
verify.rule: interface reciprocity

verify.value: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent
verify.rule: joint evidence

risk.desc: Potential warping of EPP foam core due to manufacturing process
risk.mit: Implement a post-manufacturing calibration step to correct any warping

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness in the wing rib set due to lightening pockets
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis to ensure the wing rib set meets stiffness requirements

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to tight tolerances
risk.mit: Increase tolerances slightly to allow for manufacturing variations

risk.desc: Risk of damage to control surface cutouts during assembly
risk.mit: Add protective covers during assembly and handling

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit between wing ribs and wing skin due to manufacturing variations
risk.mit: Implement a quality control step to ensure proper fit before final assembly

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.path_description: Load path from wing surface to spar and through wing rib to fuselage structure
Airflow over wing rib and through control surface cutouts
Heat dissipation from wing rib, through lightening pockets, to ambient air
Motion of control surface cutouts and hinges

verification_focus.focus_description: Ensure the wing rib set does not exceed the mass budget
Ensure the load path is continuous from the wing surface to the fuselage structure
Ensure all interfaces have adequate clearance for assembly

generated_parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
generated_parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

requirements: Subsystem module: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2 (fixed BOM item inside Long-Range Surveillance Wing)
Spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover
Vehicle context: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Suggested material: EPP foam core + CFRP spar, process: FDM + foam

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.value: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: p0_feature_mapping: good: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets. | bad: P0 lists features but geometry_ops are generic boxes at the origin.

verify.value: Adjacent subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.
verify.rule: Reciprocal interface rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Joint evidence rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: All required evidence_features appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Include checks for schema completeness, mass budget, P0-to-geometry traceability, interface reciprocity, and fastener locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of control horn and elevon due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement a tolerance stack-up analysis and adjust manufacturing process to minimize misalignment.

risk.desc: Cable routing may be compromised if not properly protected against strain and sharp edges.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have strain relief geometry and are routed with consideration for minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Servo and control horn may be difficult to access for maintenance if access cover is not properly designed.
risk.mit: Design access cover with clear geometry markings for easy removal and reassembly.

risk.desc: Thermal management of gimbal electronics may be compromised if the window is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment of the window during assembly and conduct thermal testing.

risk.desc: Optical clarity of window may be affected if the window is not properly sealed.
risk.mit: Use a high-quality sealant and conduct optical clarity testing.

risk.desc: Load path continuity from wing spar to gimbal mount may be compromised if the spar socket is not properly integrated.
risk.mit: Ensure the spar socket is securely integrated and conduct load testing.

risk.desc: Potential for design drift into weaponized or operational payload details.
risk.mit: Strictly adhere to the design brief and ensure the payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only.

risk.desc: Battery bay design may not allow for CG adjustment if the battery is not properly isolated.
risk.mit: Ensure the battery bay uses slide rails and CG marks for independent removal.
